strengths: Clear structure with well-defined headers and sections
Specific details, numbers, and dates provided for tasks
Good organization of content, with separate sections for different phases
weaknesses: Some sections are incomplete or lack specific details
Language could be clearer in some areas, with less reliance on abbreviations
No clear timeline or deadlines for some tasks
top_fixes: Add specific deadlines for tasks in PH2 and PH3
Provide more details on the parameters and methodology for the parameter sensitivity analysis
Clarify the language and terminology used in the document, especially for non-technical readers
blocking_issues: Lack of a clear plan for data collection and analysis in PH2
Insufficient information on the infrastructure and resources required for the project
No clear indication of how the project will be evaluated or measured for success
